adequacy_contracts: source context adequate for drafting only
render result adequate for local HTML build only
budget_limits: no benchmark claim without run record
merge_conditions: do not merge branch outputs with conflicting source boundaries
assumption_refs: fixture assumes required files exist locally
escalation_policy: failed quality predicate emits residual or escalates for review
residuals: acyclicity is not mechanically checked by this schema fixture
cost_quality_ledger: fixture records intended cost-quality fields only
non_claims: fixture does not prove scheduler behavior
fixture does not prove cost savings
